page: OVHcloud c3-32 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs running at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is provided by a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 2 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The system runs on a KVM hypervisor and includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU and Geekbench single-core scores placing in the top 25%. Multi-core performance, measured by stress-ng and Geekbench multi-core tests, falls within the average range. Memory performance is characterized by a strong PassMark memory score, though large-block memory read and write bandwidths remain average. The server demonstrates strong capabilities in text processing and bzip3 decompression, alongside average performance in software compilation, ray tracing, and static web serving.

Given its dedicated core allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the c3-32 offers a balanced cost-to-performance profile for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The inclusion of a 400 GB NVMe SSD adds storage value without requiring external volumes. This instance is suited for single-threaded tasks, text processing, web serving, and moderate database operations.
description: OVHcloud c3-32 is a compute-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores (16 vCPUs) running at 2.3 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and a 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under a KVM hypervisor. Benchmarks show strong single-core CPU performance and bzip3 decompression speeds, placing in the top 25%, while multi-core operations and memory bandwidth fall into the average tier. The dedicated core design and 1:2 RAM-to-vCPU ratio make this instance highly efficient for compute-bound workloads, single-threaded applications, text processing, and moderate database tasks.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-32 is a compute-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 32 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering strong single-core performance for compute-bound workloads.

tagline: A dedicated sixteen-core compute-optimized server featuring high-speed NVMe storage and strong single-core performance for processing-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores running at 2.3 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory and a 400 GB local NVMe SSD
Strong single-core CPU and text processing performance
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Suited for single-threaded tasks, text processing, and web serving
